title: schizachyrium scoparium subvar. cubense
intro: Schizachyrium scoparium subvar. cubense, also known as Little Bluestem, is a type of grass that belongs to the Andropogoninae subtribe. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Schizachyrium scoparium subvar. cubense include its potential to help reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. It is often prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures to be used in herbal remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal dosing.
